description: Generate comprehensive evidence summary visualization for AGR3 core function hypothesis
code:
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib
matplotlib.rcParams['font.size'] = 9

# Create a comprehensive evidence summary figure
fig, axes = plt.subplots(2, 2, figsize=(14, 10))
fig.suptitle('AGR3 Core Function Hypothesis: Evidence Summary', fontsize=14, fontweight='bold')

# Panel A: Active site comparison
ax1 = axes[0, 0]
ax1.set_title('A. Active Site Motif Comparison', fontweight='bold')
proteins = ['P4HB (PDI1)', 'ERp57', 'ERp18/TXNDC12', 'AGR2', 'AGR3']
motifs = ['WCGHC', 'WCGHC', 'CGAC', 'CPHS', 'DCQYS']
num_cys = [2, 2, 2, 1, 1]
pdi_activity = ['Yes (CXXC)', 'Yes (CXXC)', 'Yes (CXXC)', 'Reduced (CxxS)', 'None shown']
colors = ['#2ecc71', '#2ecc71', '#2ecc71', '#f39c12', '#e74c3c']

y_pos = range(len(proteins))
bars = ax1.barh(y_pos, num_cys, color=colors, edgecolor='black', height=0.6)
ax1.set_yticks(y_pos)
ax1.set_yticklabels(proteins)
ax1.set_xlabel('Active Site Cysteines')
for i, (motif, activity) in enumerate(zip(motifs, pdi_activity)):
    ax1.text(2.1, i, f'{motif} → {activity}', va='center', fontsize=8)
ax1.set_xlim(0, 5.5)
ax1.axvline(x=2, color='gray', linestyle='--', alpha=0.5, label='Min for thiol exchange')

# Panel B: CBF phenotype summary
ax2 = axes[0, 1]
ax2.set_title('B. Ciliary Beat Frequency Phenotype\n(Bonser et al. 2015)', fontweight='bold')
conditions = ['Basal\n(+Ca²⁺)', 'ATP-stimulated\n(+Ca²⁺)', 'Ca²⁺-free']
wt_cbf = [100, 140, 70]  # Normalized relative values
ko_cbf = [80, 91, 70]  # 20% lower basal, 35% lower stimulated, no diff in Ca-free
x = range(len(conditions))
width = 0.35
bars1 = ax2.bar([i - width/2 for i in x], wt_cbf, width, label='WT', color='#3498db', edgecolor='black')
bars2 = ax2.bar([i + width/2 for i in x], ko_cbf, width, label='AGR3 KO', color='#e74c3c', edgecolor='black')
ax2.set_xticks(x)
ax2.set_xticklabels(conditions)
ax2.set_ylabel('Relative CBF (%)')
ax2.legend()
ax2.annotate('↓20%', xy=(0, 85), fontsize=10, ha='center', color='red', fontweight='bold')
ax2.annotate('↓35%', xy=(1, 110), fontsize=10, ha='center', color='red', fontweight='bold')
ax2.annotate('n.s.', xy=(2, 72), fontsize=10, ha='center', color='gray')
ax2.set_ylim(0, 170)

# Panel C: Expression pattern
ax3 = axes[1, 0]
ax3.set_title('C. AGR3 vs AGR2 Expression Pattern', fontweight='bold')
cell_types = ['Ciliated\nepithelial', 'Mucous/\nGoblet', 'ER stress\nresponse', 'Oviduct\nciliated', 'Breast\ncancer']
agr3_expr = [1.0, 0.0, 0.0, 1.0, 0.6]
agr2_expr = [0.3, 1.0, 1.0, 0.3, 0.8]
x = range(len(cell_types))
bars1 = ax3.bar([i - width/2 for i in x], agr3_expr, width, label='AGR3', color='#9b59b6', edgecolor='black')
bars2 = ax3.bar([i + width/2 for i in x], agr2_expr, width, label='AGR2', color='#1abc9c', edgecolor='black')
ax3.set_xticks(x)
ax3.set_xticklabels(cell_types, fontsize=8)
ax3.set_ylabel('Relative Expression')
ax3.legend()
ax3.set_ylim(0, 1.3)

# Panel D: Evidence hierarchy
ax4 = axes[1, 1]
ax4.set_title('D. Evidence Hierarchy for GO Annotation', fontweight='bold')
ax4.axis('off')

evidence_text = """
GO:0003351 (cilium movement in fluid movement)
  Evidence: IMP (mouse KO → reduced CBF)
  Strength: ●●●○○  Moderate
  Qualifier: involved_in (BP)
  
GO:0019722 (calcium-mediated signaling)
  Evidence: IMP (Ca²⁺-free rescues KO phenotype)
  Strength: ●●○○○  Weak-Moderate
  Qualifier: involved_in (BP)
  Caveat: required for ≠ directly performs

GO:0005783 (endoplasmic reticulum)
  Evidence: IDA (HPA immunostaining)
  Strength: ●●●●○  Strong
  Status: Already annotated

MF term (unresolved):
  No direct enzymatic assay
  Strength: ○○○○○  None
  Gap: Molecular client unknown
"""
ax4.text(0.02, 0.95, evidence_text, transform=ax4.transAxes, fontsize=8,
         verticalalignment='top', fontfamily='monospace',
         bbox=dict(boxstyle='round', facecolor='lightyellow', alpha=0.8))

plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig('agr3_evidence_summary.png', dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.show()
print("Evidence summary figure saved.")
